title: "Elvis Presley Gold" Commemorative Issue Order, 2006, SRO 21 of 2006
text:
2006 STAMP S.R.O. 21
COMMONWEALTH OF DOMINICA
STATUTORY RULES AND ORDERS NO. 21 OF 2006
ORDER
MADE by the Minister under sections 3 and 4 of the Stamp Act,
(Chapter 68:01).
(Gazetted 22nd June, 2006)
1. This Order may be cited as the-
Short title.
“ELVIS PRESLEY GOLD” COMMEMORATIVE
STAMP ISSUE ORDER, 2006
2. In this Order, the term “stamp” means an adhesive stamp
Interpretation.
for postage and revenue.
3. During the period from 14th February, 2006 to 13th May,
Stamps.
2006 both days inclusive, there shall be issued throughout the
State, Special Commonwealth of Dominica postage stamps
(“ELVIS PRESLEY GOLD” COMMEMORATIVE STAMP
ISSUE) of values and colours specified in the Schedule I and the
Schedule I.
designs specified in the Schedule II hereto. Schedule II.
4. The dies and other implements required to give effect to
Dies.
this Order shall be destroyed together with all residue whatso-
ever of all stamps authorized hereby, as soon as possible after the
13th day of May, 2006.
5. This Order shall be deemed to have come into force on the
Commencement.
14th day of February, 2006.

2006 STAMP S.R.O. 21
SCHEDULE I
Adhesive stamps will be as follows:
Gold foil souvenir sheet
One stamp @ $20.00 each - gold, black, gray,
brown, white
SCHEDULE II
$ 20.00 stamp depicts - 70th anniversary
since the birth of
Elvis Presley (1935-1977)
Made this 23rd day of May, 2006
AMBROSE GEORGE
Minister for Public Works
and Public Utilities
DOMINICA
Printed by the Government of Printer at the Government Printery, Roseau
(Price 40 cents)
